description: Aptify (Community Brands / Momentive Software) Web Services API credentials. Token-based auth: POST {BaseURL}/authentication with Username/Password (and optional AuthProvider) returns a TokenId; the connector sends `Authorization: Web {TokenId}` on subsequent requests. Each customer has a tenant-specific BaseURL pointing at their AptifyServicesAPI install.

BaseURL.title: Aptify Services API Base URL
BaseURL.description: Full base URL to the customer's Aptify Services API (no trailing slash). Examples: https://customer.aptifyondemand.com/AptifyServicesAPI, https://api.example.org/AptifyServicesAPI. The /authentication and /services/{Entity} paths are appended at request time.

Username.title: API Username
Username.description: Aptify user with API access. Typically a service account scoped to read/write the entities you intend to sync.

Password.title: API Password
Password.description: Password for the Aptify API user.

AuthProvider.title: Auth Provider (optional)
AuthProvider.description: Aptify authentication provider. Defaults to 'AptifyUser' when omitted. Set to a custom provider name (e.g., a federated identity provider) only if your install requires it.
